docs.title: Flask Endless Task List Application with Levels and Experience Points (XP)
docs.text: This app is an endless task list application with levels and experience points (XP). It uses SQLAlchemy to store user and task list data to the database.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
1. Clone the repository
  2. Install dependencies: pip install -r requirements.txt
  3. Run the app python app.py
  4. Open localhost:8081 on your web browser
